description: Create a 'Buy 2 Get 1 Free' cart price rule named 'Clothing BOGO' for the 'Clothing' category. The rule must be active for the Main Website and all Customer Groups with no coupon required and a priority of 1. Configure the rule to apply only to items in the 'Clothing' category using the 'Buy X get Y free' action with a discount amount of 1 and a discount quantity step of 3. Enable 'Discard Subsequent Rules'. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
